name: 17"x24" Double Dash Flannel Cushion Bath Rug - Room Essentials™
description:
Instantly upgrade your bathroom decor with this Double Dash Flannel Cushion Bath Rug from Room Essentials™. The rectangular bath mat features a black double dash pattern on a neutral backdrop for a modern look that blends well with a variety of decor schemes. The microfiber flannel fabric provides soft comfort underfoot, while the non-skid backing helps keep it in place. Plus, it can be machine washed as needed for quick and easy cleaning.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
